title: Act of contacting or retaining an attorney
doc_html:
Art. 415.  Act of contacting or retaining an attorney

In any criminal proceeding, the act of contacting or retaining an attorney shall not be admissible against any individual or entity, unless such act falls within an established exception for crime or fraud.

Acts 1993, No. 626, §1.
